title: Custom-agent marketing refresh and richer agent pages
summary: The public site now treats Custom Agent / Web Runner as the flagship workflow, with richer agent pages on both the marketing site and the local dashboard.

sections.title: New
items: Dedicated flagship page for Custom Agent / Web Runner with setup guidance, examples, and realistic limitations.
Starter-agent detail pages on the public site with commands, examples, tips, and limitations.
Dedicated localhost dashboard detail pages for both starter and custom agents.
Structured manifest data layer shared across public agent pages and the dashboard.

sections.title: Improved
items: The public agents catalog now leads with the flagship custom-agent story instead of starter templates alone.
Homepage and install flow now point users more clearly toward building their own browser automation agent.
Dashboard cards now include direct access to richer per-agent detail views.

title: Initial public launch
summary: CtxAnt launched as a local-first Mac app that lets users text their real browser from Telegram, with starter agents, scheduling, and a Chrome extension bridge.

sections.title: Shipped
items: Hub bot plus deployable starter agents including Job Hunter, Deal Finder, Inbox Triage, Social Poster, Researcher, Morning Digest, and Web Runner.
Chrome extension pairing over localhost so the agent can drive the browser you are already signed into.
Menu-bar Mac app, onboarding wizard, local SQLite persistence, and per-agent schedules.
Static marketing site, one-line install script, and release/update feed.
